summary: Backend-only testing of TN-Flow engine modules: exceptions.py, constraint.py, vastu_router.py. All 44 tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: South-facing entrance zone test (SE) and West-facing entrance zone test (NW) pass but with conditional checks — if the seed data doesn't include Entrance for those facings at P1, the test is vacuously true. Main agent should verify seed data explicitly includes Entrance zones for South/West facings.

db.py uses a relative path 'sqlite:///./tn_flow.db' which is CWD-dependent — running from a different directory will create a new empty DB. Consider using an absolute path based on __file__ for production robustness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 44 engine tests pass. DB seeded: 26 PlotEligibilityRules + 120 VastuGridLogic rows. Test file at /app/tn_flow_project/tests/test_tn_flow_engine.py. Run: cd /app/tn_flow_project && pytest tests/test_tn_flow_engine.py -v
